title: SSRF protection bypass: default-insecure deny list in httpSecurity.ts
description: The SSRF wrappers in packages/components/src/httpSecurity.ts (checkDenyList, and resolveAndValidate used by secureFetch/secureAxiosRequest) are gated entirely on the HTTP_DENY_LIST environment variable. In checkDenyList(), if HTTP_DENY_LIST is undefined the function returns immediately (if (!httpDenyListString) return), and resolveAndValidate() likewise only calls isDeniedIP when a deny list is present. In the default deployment (no HTTP_DENY_LIST set) no IPs are blocked, so any node relying on these wrappers can reach loopback, link-local (169.254.169.254 cloud metadata), and private-range hosts, completely defeating the intended SSRF protection.
